title: Eco Adventure Safari – Budget
description: An eco-friendly safari combining wildlife, conservation and community experiences across Lumo Conservancy and Samburu. Travel sustainably while engaging in meaningful cultural interactions and conservation initiatives.
highlights: Game drives in Lumo and Samburu
Train journey from Nairobi to Voi

itinerary.title: Arrival in Nairobi
itinerary.description: Arrival at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Lumo
itinerary.description: Train journey to Voi followed by transfer to Lumo Conservancy and afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Community Conservation Projects
itinerary.description: Visit local schools and community projects supporting education and sustainability.

itinerary.title: Taita Cultural Experience
itinerary.description: Full day cultural immersion with Taita community including traditional cooking and activities.

itinerary.title: Return to Nairobi
itinerary.description: Transfer back to Nairobi by train and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Drive to Samburu
itinerary.description: Scenic drive to Samburu National Reserve with afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Samburu Community Experience
itinerary.description: Game drives, community visits and conservation activities including tree planting.

itinerary.title: Reteti Elephant Sanctuary
itinerary.description: Visit Reteti Elephant Sanctuary and learn about community-led conservation.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning game drive followed by return to Nairobi for departure.

included: Park fees for Lumo and Samburu
accommodation: Crowne Plaza Airport Hotel – Nairobi (1 night)
Soroi Cheetah Tented Camp – Lumo (3 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Light clothing for warm weather, comfortable walking shoes, modest wear for community visits, and a light jacket for mornings.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals during safari with a mix of local and international cuisine. Some meals in Nairobi are excluded.

note: Pricing varies depending on season and group size. Festive season supplements may apply.
